expression.expression: 'No account found on Minerva for this Account number'

fileTabs.content: SELECT /*+ parallel(A) */  	A.EFROM as EFROM,  	A.PREV_ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID as PREV_ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID, 	A.CURR_ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID as CURR_ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID,  	A.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,  	A.TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE as TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE 	A.NUMBER_OF_TRANSFERS as NUMBER_OF_TRANSFERS,  	A.ACCID as ACCID  FROM  	ACCOUNT_TRANSFER_HISTORY A WHERE 	A.ETO IS NULL
SELECT /*+ parallel(A) */ 	A.ACCID as ACCID,  	A.CURR_ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID as CURR_ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID  FROM  	ACCOUNT_TRANSFER_HISTORY A WHERE 	A.ETO IS NULL
SELECT /*+ parallel(RTS) */ --     RTS.OLD_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,      RTS.NEW_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,      RTS.TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE  -- FROM REP_G2_ACCOUNT_TFR_STAGING RTS

parameters.arg3: CASE WHEN sum(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC NULLS FIRST) = 1 THEN business_date_string__find_business_date_lkp_1 ELSE cast(null as STRING) END
parameters.arg4: substring(CASE WHEN sum(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC NULLS FIRST) = 1 THEN business_date_string__find_business_date_lkp_1 ELSE cast(null as STRING) END, 1, 8)

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN CAST(((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) IS NULL) AS BOOL) THEN (ERROR('No Business Date found on dbattriute')) ELSE (PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y%m%d', CAST(SUBSTRING((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) , 0 , 8) AS STRING))) END)

(DATE_ADD((CASE WHEN CAST(((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) IS NULL) AS BOOL) THEN (ERROR('No Business Date found on dbattriute')) ELSE (PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y%m%d', CAST(SUBSTRING((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) , 0 , 8) AS STRING))) END)  ,INTERVAL -1  DAY))
(CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) = 1) THEN output_sp ELSE NULL END)

(CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTRING((LTRIM((RTRIM(TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN)))) , 0 , 7) AS STRING) = '0000000') THEN NULL WHEN (SUBSTRING((LTRIM((RTRIM(TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN)))) , 0 , 7) IS NULL) THEN NULL WHEN (SUBSTRING((LTRIM((RTRIM(TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN)))) , 0 , 7) = CAST((NOT (CASE WHEN ((REGEXP_CONTAINS(SUBSTRING((LTRIM((RTRIM(TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN)))) , 0 , 7), '^[0-9]+$')) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(SUBSTRING((LTRIM((RTRIM(TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN)))) , 0 , 7) AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END)) AS STRING)) THEN NULL ELSE (DATE_ADD((PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y%m%d', CAST((CONCAT(SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING((LTRIM((RTRIM(TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN)))) , 0 , 7) , 0 , 4), '0101')) AS STRING)))  , INTERVAL (CAST(SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING((LTRIM((RTRIM(TRANSFER_EFFECTIVE_DATE_IN)))) , 0 , 7) , 4 , 3) AS FLOAT64) - 1)  DAY)) END)

fileTabs.content: SELECT /*+ parallel(A) */ 	A.ACCID as ACCID,  	A.ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID as ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID  FROM  	ACCOUNT_ALIAS A WHERE 	A.ETO IS NULL AND	A.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'G'
